enums.c(3) Library Functions Manual enums.c(3)

NAME

enums.c - Option enum value implementation with dynamic enum-to-string mapping.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct enum_to_string_entry_t
Maps a single enum value to its string representation. struct enum_map_descriptor_t
Descriptor for an enum option with its string value mapping.

Functions


const char ** options_get_enum_values (const char *option_name, size_t *value_count)
Get all unique string values for an option. bool options_is_enum_option (const char *option_name)
Check if an option has enum values.

Detailed Description

Option enum value implementation with dynamic enum-to-string mapping.

Definition in file enums.c.

Function Documentation

const char ** options_get_enum_values (const char * option_name, size_t * value_count)

Get all unique string values for an option. Extracts the list of valid string values for an enum option. For options with aliases (like render-mode which has "foreground" and "fg"), both values are included.

Parameters

option_name Option long name (e.g., "log-level")
value_count OUTPUT: Number of values returned

Returns

Array of valid string values, or NULL if not an enum option

Definition at line 143 of file enums.c.

143                                                                                    {
144   if (!option_name || !value_count) {
145     return NULL;
146   }
147 
148   /* Find the option's mapping in the registry */
149   const enum_map_descriptor_t *descriptor = NULL;
150   for (size_t i = 0; enum_registry[i].option_name != NULL; i++) {
151     if (strcmp(enum_registry[i].option_name, option_name) == 0) {
152       descriptor = &enum_registry[i];
153       break;
154     }
155   }
156 
157   if (!descriptor || !descriptor->map) {
158     *value_count = 0;
159     return NULL;
160   }
161 
162   /* Count non-terminator entries */
163   size_t count = 0;
164   for (size_t i = 0; descriptor->map[i].enum_value != -1; i++) {
165     count++;
166   }
167 
168   /* Build array of unique strings (skip duplicates from aliases) */
169   const char **values = SAFE_MALLOC(count * sizeof(const char *), const char **);
170   size_t unique_count = 0;
171 
172   for (size_t i = 0; descriptor->map[i].enum_value != -1; i++) {
173     const char *str = descriptor->map[i].string;
174 
175     /* Check if we already have this string (for aliases) */
176     bool already_added = false;
177     for (size_t j = 0; j < unique_count; j++) {
178       if (strcmp(values[j], str) == 0) {
179         already_added = true;
180         break;
181       }
182     }
183 
184     if (!already_added) {
185       values[unique_count++] = str;
186     }
187   }
188 
189   *value_count = unique_count;
190   return values;
191 }




References enum_to_string_entry_t::enum_value,
    enum_map_descriptor_t::map, SAFE_MALLOC, and
    enum_to_string_entry_t::string.


Referenced by asciichat_suggest_enum_value().






bool options_is_enum_option (const char *
  option_name)


Check if an option has enum values.


Parameters


option_name Option long name


Returns


true if option has enum values, false otherwise


Definition at line 199 of file enums.c.


199                                                      {
200   if (!option_name) {
201     return false;
202   }
203 
204   for (size_t i = 0; enum_registry[i].option_name != NULL; i++) {
205     if (strcmp(enum_registry[i].option_name, option_name) == 0) {
206       return true;
207     }
208   }
209 
210   return false;
211 }
